MATCH (a:User {demo_id: 1, demo_graph: 'social'}), (b:User {demo_id: 2, demo_graph: 'social'}) RETURN a NEXT INSERT (a)-[:FOLLOWS {demo_edge_id: 'alice-follows-bob', demo_kind: 'follows'}]->(b)
